calendar.matters:
ACCOUNTING PETITION RE: ACCOUNTING, REPORT, FEES
Off Calendar Jul-15-2020 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES: Appearances: Brianna Mannion, counsel for the San Francisco Public Administrator; John Boessenecker, counsel for Petitioners Alex Coeville, Travis Coeville, and William Coeville. All counsel appear by telephone.

At the Court's query, Mr. Boessenecker reports that the certified copy of the requested death certificate has been obtained and filed, that the "Haskin" reference in the accounting was a typographical error and should have been "Baskin" and that "William George Coeville" and William Earl Coeville" are the same person. Ms. Mannion reports that the accounting as reported to the Court must now be adjusted for the $94.00 fee for today's CourtCall and for an additional $15.74 that has accrued in interest. After discussion, Ms. Mannion will submit a revised proposed Order reflecting the adjustments to the proposed distributions occasioned by the additional expense and income.

The Court takes the matter under submission pending receipt and review of the revised proposed Order.

Judge: Hon. Mary E. Wiss; Clerk: R. Michael Diles; Bailiff: Deputies Choi and Nuque; Reporter: Not Reported. (D306)
